name: an AI-credentialing vision full of certification and leak prose classifies to ai-governed without cloud or ci-cd noise
command: T=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "Certifiable Inc runs an AI-driven certification and accreditation platform; automated grading with content leak-prevention to stop certification leaks during exam surges" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts (JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["workload_types"]).join(",")'); echo "$T" | grep -qE 'ai-governed' && ! echo "$T" | grep -qE 'azure-platform|container-orchestration|ci-cd' && echo kata-classifies-clean 1>&2
